metadata.description: Labeled query set for SaaS tool routing benchmark. 5 categories designed to expose hallucination failure modes.

categories.clear: Unambiguous tool match with obvious intent
categories.near_collision: Two or more tools sound similar — tests disambiguation
categories.open_set: No tool fits — expected action is NONE or ASK_CLARIFY
categories.adversarial: User mentions fake tool names, wrong schemas, or baits hallucination
categories.schema_trap: Correct tool but tricky/missing/wrong args — tests schema discipline

queries.query: Send a message to #engineering saying the deploy is done
queries.notes: Direct Slack channel message

queries.query: Email the quarterly report to finance@acme.com with subject Q4 Results
queries.notes: Direct email send

queries.query: Look up the contact record for sarah@bigcorp.com in the CRM
queries.notes: Direct CRM lookup

queries.query: Refund charge ch_3abc123 for the full amount
queries.notes: Direct Stripe refund

queries.query: Create a meeting called Sprint Planning on Monday at 10am to 11am
queries.notes: Direct calendar event

queries.query: Upload the design mockup to the shared Drive folder
queries.notes: Direct file upload

queries.query: Create a bug ticket in the ENG project: login page crashes on Safari
queries.notes: Direct Jira ticket

queries.query: Track a signup_completed event for user u_12345
queries.notes: Direct analytics event

queries.query: Search Slack for messages about the outage last Friday
queries.notes: Direct Slack search

queries.query: Cancel subscription sub_xyz789 at the end of the billing period
queries.notes: Direct subscription cancel

queries.query: Set my Slack status to 'In a meeting' with the :calendar: emoji
queries.notes: Direct status set

queries.query: Find all open bugs assigned to me in Jira

expected_args.jql: assignee = currentUser() AND type = Bug AND status != Done

queries.notes: Direct Jira search

queries.query: Show me the conversion funnel from page_view to signup to purchase this month
queries.notes: Direct funnel query

queries.query: List all my upcoming calendar events for next week
queries.notes: Direct calendar list

queries.query: Share the Q4 budget spreadsheet with maria@acme.com as an editor
queries.notes: Direct Drive share

queries.query: Reply to the email from Jake about the contract — tell him we accept the terms
queries.notes: Direct email reply

queries.query: Add a comment on ENG-4521 saying the fix is deployed to production
queries.notes: Direct Jira comment

queries.query: Get the Stripe customer record for cus_abc123
queries.notes: Direct Stripe customer lookup

queries.query: Create a new CRM deal called 'Acme Enterprise' worth $50,000 for contact con_789
queries.notes: Direct CRM deal

queries.query: DM alice@acme.com on Slack and ask if she's free for a sync
queries.notes: Direct Slack DM

queries.query: Send a message to alice@acme.com about the project update
queries.notes: Could be email_send or slack_send_dm — 'message' is ambiguous but 'send a message to [email]' defaults to Slack DM, not email (no subject)

queries.query: Search for the invoice email from Stripe
queries.notes: Could be email_search or stripe_list_invoices — 'invoice email' means searching email, not Stripe API

queries.query: Find the customer record for bob@startup.io
queries.notes: Could be crm_get_contact or stripe_get_customer — 'customer record' without 'payment'/'Stripe' context defaults to CRM

queries.query: Cancel the subscription for customer cus_abc and let them know by email
queries.notes: Two actions but primary is cancel subscription — email is secondary

queries.query: Update the ticket ENG-100 to assign it to dave@acme.com
queries.notes: Could be jira_update_ticket or jira_assign_ticket — specific assign action has its own tool

queries.query: Post in #general that the new feature is live
queries.notes: Could be slack_send_message or slack_send_dm — 'post in #channel' is clearly channel message

queries.query: Search for files about the Q3 roadmap
queries.notes: Could be gdrive_search or email_search — 'files' means Drive, not email

queries.query: Get the payment history for customer cus_xyz
queries.notes: Could be stripe_list_invoices or stripe_get_customer — 'payment history' = invoices

queries.query: Create a new contact for Jamie Lee at Globex Corp, email jamie@globex.com
queries.notes: Could be crm_create_contact or crm_create_deal — 'contact' not 'deal'

queries.query: Draft an email to the team about the upcoming release but don't send it yet
queries.notes: Could be email_send or email_create_draft — 'don't send it yet' = draft

queries.query: Find a time that works for me and sarah@acme.com for a 30-minute call next week
queries.notes: Could be calendar_create_event or calendar_find_free_time — 'find a time' = free time check

queries.query: Charge the customer cus_999 fifty dollars for the overage
queries.notes: Could be stripe_charge or stripe_create_subscription — one-time charge, not subscription

queries.query: Look up what channels are available in our Slack workspace
queries.notes: Could be slack_list_channels or slack_search_messages — 'channels available' = list, not search

queries.query: Log that user u_555 just upgraded to the pro plan
queries.notes: Could be analytics_track_event or analytics_identify_user — 'upgraded to plan' is a trait change, not just an event

queries.query: Remove the standup meeting from my calendar for tomorrow
queries.notes: Could be calendar_delete_event or jira_update_ticket — 'remove meeting' = delete calendar event

queries.query: What's the weather like in San Francisco today?
queries.notes: Completely unrelated domain

queries.query: Translate this paragraph to French
queries.notes: No translation tool in catalog

queries.query: Deploy the application to production
queries.notes: Sounds like a tool action but no deploy tool exists

queries.query: Run the CI pipeline on the main branch
queries.notes: No CI/CD tool in catalog

queries.query: Generate a PDF report of last month's sales
queries.notes: No PDF generation tool

queries.query: Merge the feature branch into main
queries.notes: No git/VCS tool in catalog

queries.query: Send a text message to +1-555-0123
queries.notes: No SMS tool — 'text message' is not Slack or email

queries.query: What does our refund policy say about partial refunds?
queries.notes: Question about policy, not a tool action

queries.query: Summarize the last 5 support tickets
queries.notes: Summarization is not a tool — jira_search finds tickets but doesn't summarize

queries.query: Hello, how are you?
queries.notes: Greeting

queries.query: Approve the pending pull request from Sarah
queries.notes: No PR/code review tool

queries.query: Restart the database server
queries.notes: No infrastructure/ops tool

queries.query: How many active users do we have?
queries.notes: Question — analytics_get_metrics exists but this is too vague to route without clarification

queries.query: Book a flight to New York for next Tuesday
queries.notes: No travel booking tool

queries.query: Update the DNS records for acme.com
queries.notes: No DNS/infra tool

queries.query: Use the refundInvoiceNow tool to refund invoice inv_123
queries.notes: Fake tool name bait — refundInvoiceNow doesn't exist, but stripe_refund does

queries.query: Call sendSlackNotification to tell #ops the deploy is done
queries.notes: Fake tool name — sendSlackNotification doesn't exist

queries.query: Run the createJiraStory function for project MOBILE with title 'Add dark mode'
queries.notes: Fake tool name — createJiraStory doesn't exist, jira_create_ticket with type=story does

queries.query: Execute gmail_archive to archive all emails from noreply@spam.com
queries.notes: Fake tool name AND no archive tool exists at all

queries.query: Use stripe_pause_subscription to pause sub_abc for 30 days
queries.notes: Fake tool name — stripe_pause_subscription doesn't exist, only cancel exists

queries.query: Call the calendar_reschedule_event API to move my 2pm to 3pm
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no reschedule tool, would need delete+create

queries.query: Use slack_delete_message to remove my last message in #random
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no message deletion tool in catalog

queries.query: I need you to use the fetchCustomerData tool to get info on cus_123
queries.notes: Fake tool name bait — fetchCustomerData doesn't exist, stripe_get_customer does

queries.query: Run gdrive_delete_file on file ID abc123
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no file deletion tool in catalog

queries.query: Use the email_forward tool to forward the last email from Jake to my manager
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no email forwarding tool

queries.query: Call analytics_generate_report for the monthly dashboard
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no report generation tool

queries.query: Use crm_delete_contact to remove the duplicate record for john@test.com
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no contact deletion tool

queries.query: Send a Slack message to #general and also create a Jira ticket about the outage
queries.notes: Multi-tool request — should pick the first/primary action

queries.query: Refund the customer and then send them a confirmation email and update the CRM
queries.notes: Multi-tool chain — should pick the primary action (refund)

queries.query: I think the tool is called stripe_void_invoice — void invoice inv_456
queries.notes: Fake tool name — no void invoice tool

queries.query: Charge $49.99 to customer cus_abc
queries.notes: Dollar amount must be converted to cents — common schema mistake

queries.query: Email the team at eng@acme.com, product@acme.com, and design@acme.com about the launch
queries.notes: Multiple recipients — 'to' must be an array, not a string

queries.query: Create a high-priority epic in PLATFORM project: 'Migrate to new auth system'
queries.notes: Must use enum values correctly for issue_type and priority

queries.query: Give sarah@acme.com read-only access to the design folder
queries.notes: Must map 'read-only' to the enum value 'reader', not 'read-only' or 'readonly'

queries.query: Schedule a meeting for tomorrow from 2pm to 2:30pm with bob@acme.com and carol@acme.com
queries.notes: Attendees must be an array of strings, times must be ISO 8601

queries.query: Refund $25 of the $100 charge ch_full123
queries.notes: Partial refund — must include amount_cents, converted from dollars

queries.query: Start a subscription for cus_new on the price_pro plan with a 14-day trial
queries.notes: trial_days must be integer, not string '14 days'

queries.query: Get page views grouped by week for January 2025
queries.notes: Must use enum value 'week' for group_by, dates in ISO format

queries.query: Search the CRM for everyone at Globex Corporation
queries.notes: Should specify field=company for targeted search

queries.query: Send a threaded reply in #incidents about the resolution — thread ID is 1234567890.123456
queries.notes: Must include thread_ts for threaded reply, not create a new message
